message:
test: expand E2E coverage with VCR TUI tests, tool conformance suite,
and test infrastructure improvements

Comprehensive test expansion across multiple test files:

tests/e2e_tui.rs:
- Add VCR-based interactive TUI test infrastructure
- Add helpers: vcr_interactive_args(), build_vcr_system_prompt(),
  write_vcr_cassette() for building SSE-chunked VCR cassettes with
  tool_use and text response interactions
- Add constants for VCR test scenarios

tests/tools_conformance.rs:
- Add 684 lines of E2E tool tests with artifact logging
- Modules: e2e_read (4 tests), e2e_write (2+ tests)
- Helper functions: binary_available(), log_tool_execution()
- Each test records JSONL artifacts for traceability

tests/ext_proptest.rs:
- Add session_op_kind_always_yields_session_capability property test
- Add params_hash_differs_for_different_session_ops property test

tests/common/harness.rs:
- Add route queue support to MockHttpServer for sequenced responses
- New add_route_queue() method: each request pops front, falls back
  to static route when queue exhausted

tests/common/tmux.rs:
- Add resolve_pi_binary_path() with fallback chain
- Replace panic!() with assert!(false, ...) throughout
- Use u64::try_from() for safe elapsed time conversion
- Change exit_gracefully(&mut self) to exit_gracefully(&self)

tests/e2e_cli.rs:
- Replace panic!() with assert!(false, ...) for consistency

tests/fixtures/vcr/rpc_session_stats.json:
- New empty VCR cassette for RPC session stats tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
